cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure this out. So the problem says that Jane thinks today is June 18, 2019, but John thinks it's June 19, 2019. And then it says John is correct. So today's date is June 19, 2019. Now they want to know what the date one year ago from today would be in the MM/DD/YYYY format. First, if today is June 19, 2019, then one year before that would be June 19, 2018. But wait, is that correct? Because sometimes there are leap years to consider. For example, if today was March
